beats.name: Inciting Incident
beats.description: The event that radically upsets the balance of forces in the protagonist's life.

beats.name: First Act Climax
beats.description: A major turning point that takes the protagonist into Act Two.

beats.name: Progressive Complications
beats.description: Rising conflict with increasing pressure on the protagonist.

beats.name: Midpoint Reversal
beats.description: A major shift that redefines the central conflict.

beats.name: Second Act Climax
beats.description: The lowest point — all seems lost before the final push.

beats.name: Crisis
beats.description: The ultimate dilemma — the protagonist must make the hardest choice.

beats.name: Climax
beats.description: The decisive action that resolves the central conflict.

beats.name: Resolution
beats.description: The new equilibrium after the climax.
